recommendations.title: The King of Laughter

recommendations.title: Buffaloed
recommendations.overview: Set in the underworld of debt-collecting, homegrown hustler Peg Dahl will do anything to escape Buffalo, NY.

recommendations.title: Manuale d'amore 2 (capitoli successivi)
recommendations.overview: Paralyzed from a crash, Nicola falls for his physiotherapist Lucia. Franco and Manuela seek fertility treatment in Barcelona. Filippo and Fosco, a gay couple, plan their wedding. Ernesto, a waiter, has an affair with Spanish cook Cecilia.

recommendations.title: Crimes and Misdemeanors
recommendations.overview: A renowned ophthalmologist is desperate to cut off an adulterous relationship…which ends up in murder; and a frustrated documentary filmmaker woos an attractive television producer while making a film about her insufferably self-centered boss.

recommendations.title: Schizopolis
recommendations.overview: A man works for the unpleasant guru of a Scientology-like movement.

recommendations.title: Best Sellers
recommendations.overview: A cranky, retired author reluctantly embarks on a final book tour to help out a young publisher.
